Vice- Chainnen and Members) Rules, 1989 namely :-.. -- 1 of 8 -- 2 THE GAZETrE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PARTlI--8Ec.3(i)] I. (I) These rules may be called the Andhra Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chainnan, Vice-Chairmen and Members) Amendment Rules, 2009. (2) These shall be applicable to the Chainnan, Vice- Chairmen and Members of the Andhra Pradesh Administrative Tribunal appointed before the 19th February, 2007. 2. In rule 8 of the Andhra Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chainnen and Members) Rules, 1989 in sub-rule (2), for the words "rupees seven thousand seventy four per annum", the words "rupees fourteen thousand five hundred and thirty two per annum" shall be substituted with effect from the 1st day of January, 2006. Explanatory Memorandum: [F. No. A-I 10 I4/8/2009-ATl C. B. PALIWAL, Jt. Sccy. V·lith a vil:w to implement the recommendations of the Sixth Pay.' Commission regarding Central Government employees' pension, the Central Government has decided to revise the pension of the Chainnan, Vice-Chainnen and Members ol'the Andhra Pradesh Administrative Tribunal who were appointed before the 19th February, 2007 with effect from the I st day ofJanuary, 2006. Accordingly, the Andhra Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service ofChainnan, Vice- Chainnan and Members) Rules, 1989 are being amended with retrospective effect from the I st day of January, 2006. 2. 1t is certified that no Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Member of the Andhra Pradesh Administrative Tribunal is likely to be affected by thc proposed amendment being given retrospective effect. Explanatory Memorandum: With a view to implement the recommendations of the Sixth Pay Commission regarding Central Government employees' pension, the Central Government has decided to revise the pension onhe Chainnan, Vice-Chainnen and Members of the Himachal Pradesh Administrative Tribunal who were appointed before the 19th February, 2007 with effect from the 1st day of January, 2006. Accordingly, the llimachal Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service orChairman, Vice- Chainnan and Members) Rules, 1986 are being amended with retrospective effect from the I st day of January, 2006. , 2. It is cel1ified that no Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Member of the Himachal Pradesh Administrative Tribunal is likely to be affected by the proposed amendment being given retrospective effect. . (I) These rules may be called the Karnataka Administrative Tribunal'(Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chainnan, V ice-Chairmen and Members) Amendment Rules, 2009. (2) These shall be applicable to the Chairmen, Vice-Chairmen and Membeos of the Karnataka Administrative Tribunal appointed before the 10 th February, 2007. -- 3 of 8 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART I1-SEC. 3(i)] ======~ .~~~ 2. In rule 8 ofthe Karnataka Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vicc-Chaimlen and Members) Rules, 1986 in sub-rule (2). for the words "rupees seven thousand seventy four per annum", the words "rupees fourteen thousand five hundred and thirty two per annum" shall be substituted with effect from the 1st day of January, 2006. Explanatory Memorandum: [F. No. A-lI014/S/2009-AT] C.B. PALIWAL. Jt. Sec]. With a view to implement the recommendations of the Sixth Pay Commission regarding Central Govenuncnt employees' pcnsion, the Central Government has decidcd to revise the pension of the Chairman, Vice-Chairmen and Members of the Karnataka Administrative Tribunal who were appointed heforcthe 19th Fcbruary'-2007 with effect from the 15t day of January, 2006. Accordingly. the Karnataka Administrative Tribuna! (Salaries and A110wanccs and Conditions of Service ofChainnan, Vice~ Chairman and Members) Rules, 1986 arc heing amended with retrospective effect from the I st day of January, 2006. 2. ''IT.'li1.f.!. 1048(-31), illfr& 13 "I'f1fi\, 1989 1 m."IiT.f.l. 743(-31), ilRt'& 7~, 1994 4. m."IiT.f.l. 699( -31), illfr& 26 ~, 1995 5. m."IiT.f.l. 471(31), ilRt'&4 =, 1998 6. m.'li1.f.l. 485(-31), ilRt'& 9~, 2002 7. m."IiT.f.l. 61 (I( >I), illfr& 28 3fTffil, 2002 NOTWICATION New Delhi, the 9th December, 2009 G.S.R. 878 (E).-In exercise ofthe powers confClTed . hy sub-section (1), read with clause (c) of the sub-section (2) of Section 35 and Section 36A of the Admini:-trative Tribunal Act. 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby.' makes the following rules further to amend lh·' Madhya Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Salaries ':JI1rJ Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vir'l'" Chairmen and Members) Rules, 1986 namely :- I. (I) These rules may be called the Madh,,1 Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service ofChail111an, Vice-Chainncn and Members) A.-.,endment Ru les, 2009. (2) These shall be applicable to the Chairman. Vice-Chairmen and Members of the Madhya Pra(lcsh Administrative Trihunal appointed before the 19th February,2007. 2. In rule 8 of the Madhya Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service o[Chairman, Vice-Chairmen and Members) Rules', -- 4 of 8 -- ['11'T IH5IUS 3( i) J 1986, in sub-rule (2), for the words "rupees four thousand seven hundred and sixteen per annum", the words "rupees rourteen thousand five hundred and thirty two per annum" shall be substituted with effect from the 1st day of January, 2006. Explanatory Memorandum; [F. No. A-I 10 14/8/2009-A T] C. B. PALIWAL, JI. Secy, With a view to implement the recommendations of the Sixth Pay Commission regarding Central Government Employees' Pension, the Central Government has decided to revise the pension ofthe Chainnan, Vice-Chainnen and Members of the Madhya Pradesh Administrative Tribunal who were appointed before the 19th February, 2007 with effect from the I st day of January, 2006. Accordingly, the Madhya Pradesh Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice- ChairnJan and Members) Rules, 1986 are being amended with retrospective effect from the I st day of January, 2006, 2, It is certified that no Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Member of the Madhya Pradesh Administrative Tribunal is likely to be affccted by the proposed amendment being given retrospective effect.
